full_text:
Han Qi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Qi. Served Wei. Youngest of Han De’s four sons. Died at Changshan facing Zhao Yun. Han Qi is a fictional character. Han Qi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Han Qi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
